2603.19897.title: Revealing Domain-Spatiality Patterns for Configuration Tuning: Domain Knowledge Meets Fitness Landscapes
2603.19897.paper_summary: Configuration tuning for better performance is crucial in quality assurance. Yet, there has long been a mystery on tuners' effectiveness, due to the black-box nature of configurable systems. Prior efforts predominantly adopt static domain analysis (e.g., static taint analysis), which often lacks generalizability, or dynamic data analysis (e.g., benchmarking performance analysis), limiting explainability. In this work, we embrace Fitness Landscape Analysis (FLA) as a bridge between domain knowledge and difficulty of the tuning. We propose Domland, a two-pronged methodology that synergizes the spatial information obtained from FLA and domain-driven analysis to systematically capture the hidden characteristics of configuration tuning cases, explaining how and why a tuner might succeed or fail. This helps to better interpret and contextualize the behavior of tuners and inform tuner design. To evaluate Domland, we conduct a case study of nine software systems and 93 workloads, from which we reveal several key findings: (1) configuration landscapes are inherently system-specific, with no single domain factor (e.g., system area, programming language, or resource intensity) consistently shaping their structure; (2) the core options (e.g., pic-struct of x264), which control the main functional flows, exert a stronger influence on landscape ruggedness (i.e. the difficulty of tuning) compared to resource options (e.g., cpu-independent of x264); (3) Workload effects on landscape structure are not uniformly tied to type or scale. Both contribute to landscape variations, but their impact is system-dependent.
2603.19897.paper_summary_zh: 配置調整以提高性能在品質保證中至關重要。<lb/>然而，由於可配置系統的黑箱特性，調整器的有效性長期以來一直是一個謎。<lb/>之前的努力主要採用靜態領域分析（例如，靜態污點分析），這通常缺乏普遍性，或動態數據分析（例如，基準性能分析），限制了解釋性。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們採用適應性景觀分析（FLA）作為領域知識與調整難度之間的橋樑。<lb/>我們提出了Domland，一種雙管齊下的方法論，協同利用從FLA獲得的空間信息和以領域為驅動的分析，系統性地捕捉配置調整案例的隱藏特徵，解釋調整器成功或失敗的原因和方式。<lb/>這有助於更好地解釋和上下文化調整器的行為，並為調整器設計提供信息。<lb/>為了評估Domland，我們對九個軟體系統和93個工作負載進行了案例研究，從中揭示了幾個關鍵發現：（1）配置景觀本質上是系統特定的，沒有單一的領域因素（例如，系統區域、程式語言或資源強度）能夠持續地塑造其結構；（2）核心選項（例如，x264的pic-struct）控制主要功能流程，對景觀崎嶇性（即調整的難度）施加更強的影響，相較於資源選項（例如，x264的cpu-independent）；（3）工作負載對景觀結構的影響並不均勻地與類型或規模相關。<lb/>兩者都對景觀變化有所貢獻，但其影響依賴於系統。
2603.19897.author: Yulong Ye et.al.
2603.19897.authors: Yulong Ye, Hongyuan Liang, Chao Jiang, Miqing Li, Tao Chen
